description_long: This is a rugged, heavy-duty hammer with a thick, cylindrical handle and a large, roughly spherical head. The handle appears to be made of wood, showing a natural grain and some darkened areas, possibly from use or aging. The head is bulbous and irregular, with a textured, almost wrapped appearance, suggesting it may be reinforced or covered with additional material. The coloration is predominantly brown with some lighter and darker patches, giving it a weathered, utilitarian look. There are no visible brand markings or decorative elements, emphasizing its functional, workmanlike design. The hammer shows signs of wear, with scuffs and discoloration, indicating it has seen significant use.
description: A robust, weathered hammer with a thick wooden handle and a large, irregularly shaped head, showing signs of heavy use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full length of the handle and the rounded, textured head facing forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the cylindrical handle and the bulbous, irregular head profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, revealing its uneven, wrapped-like texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the length of the handle and the head's asymmetrical shape.
attribute_handle_type: Wooden straight handle with visible grain, slightly textured and darkened from use, no ergonomic enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Large, irregularly shaped sledge-type head with a roughly spherical, wrapped appearance and no claws or peens.
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: Visible scuffs, discoloration, and surface wear on both handle and head.
